^=Blank (skip pattern) effective 10/01/2016
662 GG0170E1_TRNSFR_STRT_CD GG0170E1_TRNSFR_STRT_CD Chair/Bed to Chair Transfer Ability at Start of SNF PPS Part A Stay CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to transfer from the bed or chair to another chair at the start of the SNF PPS Part A
stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
 03=Partial/moderate assistance
 04=Supervision or touching assistance
 05=Setup or clean-up assistance
 06=Independent
